scope.summary: Fixes CI heartbeat reporting so required-lane gating and all watched advisory lane posture are represented separately, preventing advisory red or unknown mutation/Loom evidence from being reported as green.
out_of_scope: No live GitHub Actions lane triage or rerun is claimed.
No mutation shard, Loom workflow, driver workflow, or unrelated CI-red root cause is fixed by this close.
No change is made to the existing required-lane exit-code contract: required red or unknown lanes still fail the heartbeat; advisory scheduled lanes still do not.

entry_points.name: CI heartbeat watched-lane posture
entry_points.trace: scripts/ci_heartbeat.sh now tracks required_red/required_unknown separately from watched_red/watched_unknown. The emitted ci-heartbeat/v1 snapshot preserves blocked/any_red/any_unknown for required-lane exit semantics and adds required_* plus watched_* fields so advisory scheduled red or unknown evidence cannot be summarized as all watched lanes green.

entry_points.name: mocked mutation and Loom heartbeat regression
entry_points.trace: `bash -n scripts/ci_heartbeat.sh scripts/test_ci_heartbeat.sh && bash scripts/test_ci_heartbeat.sh` exited 0. The test uses a fake gh and a minimal taxonomy: the required lane succeeds, five scheduled mutation shard jobs from one run return failure, Loom has no completed scheduled run, and the heartbeat exits 0 while emitting watched_blocked=true, watched_red=true, watched_unknown=true, five not_green shard rows, one unknown Loom row, and no `all watched lanes are green` message.

entry_points.name: entry trace registration
entry_points.trace: scripts/entry_trace_contract.json registers scripts/test_ci_heartbeat.sh as a required-quality entry point. `bash scripts/check_entry_trace_contract.sh` no longer reports test_ci_heartbeat.sh; it still exits 1 on pre-existing unrelated unregistered scripts: scripts/eng_program_manifest_build.py, scripts/swarm_orchestrator_tick.sh, and scripts/swarm_target_janitor.sh.

entry_points.name: syntax, JSON, whitespace, and swarm staged checks
entry_points.trace: `bash -n scripts/ci_heartbeat.sh scripts/test_ci_heartbeat.sh`, `jq empty scripts/entry_trace_contract.json`, `git diff --cached --check`, `scripts/swarm_discipline.sh struct-atomicity --staged`, and `scripts/swarm_discipline.sh stale-delete-check --staged` all exited 0 before the implementation commit.

entry_points.name: landed source
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat HEAD` for ff15cc810023cc614d160f64293c7c1d5e82e3da reported exactly docs/ci-taxonomy.md, scripts/ci_heartbeat.sh, scripts/entry_trace_contract.json, and scripts/test_ci_heartbeat.sh changed: 280 insertions, 25 deletions; scripts/test_ci_heartbeat.sh is mode 100755.

limitations: This close proves heartbeat reporting logic with a local fake GitHub API; it does not claim a subsequent hosted CI Heartbeat run concluded success.

The original bead acceptance asks for live lane green/root-cause filing; the operator narrowed this turn to the heartbeat misreporting honesty defect and explicitly said not to chase unrelated red lanes.
No full workspace cargo gate is claimed from this shared checkout.
follow_ups: A future CI-tending phase can run the hosted heartbeat and triage actual current red lanes if the operator assigns that work.
